title: was the tv shows ending taking place after Eoes end
display_title: was the tv shows ending taking place after Eoes end
wikitext:
[]: was the tv shows ending taking place after Eoe's end             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Tue Oct 16, 2012 3:14 am At the End of evangelion Shinji makes the choice that everyone can come back to life if they wish too. and the point of Eoe is to replace the episode 25 and 26, or that the last 2 episodes and the movie are both happening. has anyone ever thought it possible that maybe at the very end of episode 26 when everyone is alive suddenly and clapping for Shinji that maybe this sequence is suppose to be taking place after the last scene in Eoe? it seems like it could, why could it not. after the credits for Eoe we even see a photo of all the characters and it seems to be in that same scene at the end of episode 26. no one else has ever seemed to mention this but i think the last scene of episode 26 is suppose to be taking place after everyone comes back to life from the sea of lcl.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 16, 2012 3:29 am See: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13243/EoTV-EoE-Narrative-Concurrency-Reasons-for-and-Against/

[]:             Quote Post by Oral Stage » Tue Oct 16, 2012 5:31 am Picture?! What is this, I've never even heard of it

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Oct 16, 2012 11:16 am Oral Stage wrote: Picture?! What is this, I've never even heard of it

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Oct 16, 2012 12:36 pm It was taking place while he was inside of Rei/adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 16, 2012 12:37 pm I am reminded of the guy on ANF lo these many years ago who proposed that the TV end was a do-over that Rei allowed Shiji after the utter fiasco his first attempt at Instrumentality was.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Oct 16, 2012 12:50 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I am reminded of the guy on ANF lo these many years ago who proposed that the TV end was a do-over that Rei allowed Shiji after the utter fiasco his first attempt at Instrumentality was.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue Oct 16, 2012 3:13 pm Bagheera wrote: As do-overs go that's better than most.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Oct 16, 2012 3:53 pm Dream wrote: EoTV Shinji is radically different from EoE Shinji though, so i am baffled as to how someone could come out with the interpretation that EoTV Shinji is after Shinji went throught the events of EoE.
